_purpose: Verifies the planner 1:1 welcome (added 2026-04-24). When a phone brand-new to Rally messages the Rally number 1:1, Rally replies with a welcome + install CTA. Idempotent — second 1:1 message must NOT re-send the welcome.
assert_outbound_contains: I help groups plan trips over text
add me to a group chat
Reply STOP anytime to opt out

messages._note: 1:1 first message from a fresh planner — welcome + CTA expected
1:1 follow-up — welcome should NOT repeat (silent or contextual response only)
